relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: YHWH answers Moses: now Pharaoh's grip will be broken by strong hand.
The Name speaks again: I am YHWH.
The ancestral Divine now reveals the covenant Name.
The covenant with Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob is remembered.
Groaning under forced service reaches YHWH's memory.
YHWH promises: I will bring out, rescue, redeem.
The people will be taken as YHWH's own, and they will know the liberating Divine.
The promise reaches toward the lifted-hand land.
The people cannot yet hear because their breath is crushed by hard service.
YHWH speaks again to Moses.
The command returns: speak to Pharaoh for release.
Moses asks how Pharaoh will listen when even Israel could not.
YHWH commands Moses and Aaron for Israel and Pharaoh alike.
The names of fathers' houses are remembered.
Simeon's line is named.
Levi's sons and years are named.
Gershon's sons are named.
Kohath's sons and years are named.
Merari's sons complete Levite clans.
Jochebed and Amram bear Aaron and Moses.
Izhar's sons are named.
Uzziel's sons are named.
Aaron's household is named through Elisheba and her sons.
Korah's sons are named.
Eleazar and Phinehas enter the priestly line.
This is Aaron and Moses called to bring Israel out by hosts.
These are the ones sent to speak to Pharaoh.
The day of speaking in Egypt is remembered.
YHWH says again: I am YHWH; speak all I say.
Moses still names his blocked lips before YHWH.

contemplative_note: Exodus 6 is covenant breath after backlash: the people cannot hear through crushed spirit, but YHWH still speaks liberation, names the family, and repeats the sending.
